blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,300 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.9" of snow, highs of 25°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 15".
